---
name: Recipe submission
about: Propose a new or updated app recipe for the registry
labels: recipe
---

## Recipe Summary

- App name:
- Proposed slug:
- Category:
- Upstream project:
- License:

## Why This Recipe Should Be Added or Updated

Describe the user value and intended use case.

## Runtime Details

- Container image or build source:
- Required ports:
- GPU required:
- Estimated minimum memory:
- Estimated recommended memory:
- Estimated disk requirement:

## Recipe Files

List the files included or planned:

- [ ] `recipe.yaml`
- [ ] `docker-compose.yml`
- [ ] supporting files

## Validation Checklist

- [ ] YAML uses UTF-8 encoding
- [ ] Metadata is complete and accurate
- [ ] UI path and port match the actual app behavior
- [ ] The recipe loads successfully through the backend registry loader
- [ ] Upstream source and licensing information are documented

## Operational Notes

Document any special environment variables, model downloads, tokens, or post-start behavior.

## Additional Context

Include screenshots, upstream docs, or integration notes if needed.
